statement: Build/submission-time, fail-closed gating of markdown agent skill files (SKILL.md) for prompt injection and supply-chain threats already exists as a shipped commercial product (Snyk Agent Scan + Vercel/npx skills installer).

evidence.quote: When a new agent skill is installed using the npx skills installer, Vercel's infrastructure triggers a call to Snyk's high-throughput scanning API... possible to deploy this as an automated gate at submission time — you can block truly malicious skills.

Agent Scan analyzes AI skills as a combination of Skill code and Natural language instructions to identify security risks before installation: prompt injection, malicious code, suspicious downloads, hardcoded secrets.

falsifier: If Snyk/Vercel gating were shown to be advisory-only (reports without blocking) and no other product blocked malicious skills pre-deploy, the claim would fail.
